# SRC065 - Converting Free Users to Paid Subscribers in the SaaS Context

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Section | SaaS Trials |
| Authors / source | Li |
| Year | 2021 |
| Source type | Academic working paper |
| Quality | Medium-High |
| URL | [https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3945909](https://papers.ssrn.com/sol3/papers.cfm?abstract_id=3945909) |

## Bias / limitation

Context-specific; working paper.

## Core takeaway

Trial conversion depends on marketing touchpoints, message content, and user behavior.

## How the marketing agent should use it

Use to connect ads to activation, not just signups.

## Tactics unlocked

- Convert source insight into a campaign hypothesis.
- Translate the hypothesis into one ad angle, one landing-page proof section, and one measurement plan.
- Record whether the tactic worked in `memory/tactic_performance.md`.

## Agent instruction

When this source is relevant, write one sentence explaining **why this source applies to the buyer state** before using it.
